text: Healthcare sector also innovates without a cabinet. [Column](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/column.html). [Healthcare](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/healthcare/index.html). 03/06/2025 • 4 minutes reading. [David Bolscher](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/authors/david-bolscher/index.html). The fall of the cabinet is a setback for the challenges the Netherlands faces. Dossiers on housing construction and nitrogen are being delayed and a healthcare agreement with resources for digitalization has not been forthcoming for the time being.

metadata.source_title: The healthcare sector also innovates without a cabinet

text: Healthcare sector also innovates without a cabinet. [Column](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/column.html). [Healthcare](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/healthcare/index.html). 03/06/2025 • 4 minutes reading. [David Bolscher](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/authors/david-bolscher/index.html). The fall of the cabinet is a setback for the challenges the Netherlands faces. Dossiers on housing construction and nitrogen are being delayed and a healthcare agreement with resources for digitalization has not been forthcoming for the time being. That's okay, because healthcare providers are already successfully innovating in response to the tight labor market.

metadata.source_title: The healthcare sector also innovates without a cabinet

text: Healthcare sector also innovates without a cabinet. [Column](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/column.html). [Healthcare](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/healthcare/index.html). 03/06/2025 • 4 minutes reading. [David Bolscher](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/authors/david-bolscher/index.html). The fall of the cabinet is a setback for the challenges the Netherlands faces. Dossiers on housing construction and nitrogen are being delayed and a healthcare agreement with resources for digitalization has not been forthcoming for the time being. That's okay, because healthcare providers are already successfully innovating in response to the tight labor market. The next government would be better off spending additional resources on welfare and prevention.

metadata.source_title: The healthcare sector also innovates without a cabinet

text: The fall of the cabinet is a setback for the challenges the Netherlands faces. Dossiers on housing construction and nitrogen are being delayed and a healthcare agreement with resources for digitalization has not been forthcoming for the time being. That's okay, because healthcare providers are already successfully innovating in response to the tight labor market. The next government would be better off spending additional resources on welfare and prevention. The Schoof Cabinet's ambition to make healthcare more accessible was great.

metadata.source_title: The healthcare sector also innovates without a cabinet

text: Dossiers on housing construction and nitrogen are being delayed and a healthcare agreement with resources for digitalization has not been forthcoming for the time being. That's okay, because healthcare providers are already successfully innovating in response to the tight labor market. The next government would be better off spending additional resources on welfare and prevention. The Schoof Cabinet's ambition to make healthcare more accessible was great. The cabinet's showpiece, halving the deductible by 2027, is now in doubt with the fall of the cabinet.

metadata.source_title: The healthcare sector also innovates without a cabinet

text: That's okay, because healthcare providers are already successfully innovating in response to the tight labor market. The next government would be better off spending additional resources on welfare and prevention. The Schoof Cabinet's ambition to make healthcare more accessible was great. The cabinet's showpiece, halving the deductible by 2027, is now in doubt with the fall of the cabinet. The Court of Audit [recently ruled](https://www.rekenkamer.nl/publicaties/verslag/2025/05/21/vo-2024-vws) that the policy of the Ministry of Health, Welfare and Sport (VWS) is not clear or does not work.

metadata.source_title: The healthcare sector also innovates without a cabinet

text: The next government would be better off spending additional resources on welfare and prevention. The Schoof Cabinet's ambition to make healthcare more accessible was great. The cabinet's showpiece, halving the deductible by 2027, is now in doubt with the fall of the cabinet. The Court of Audit [recently ruled](https://www.rekenkamer.nl/publicaties/verslag/2025/05/21/vo-2024-vws) that the policy of the Ministry of Health, Welfare and Sport (VWS) is not clear or does not work. It is unclear whether the agreements in the Integrated Care Agreement (IZA) contribute to future-proof care.

metadata.source_title: The healthcare sector also innovates without a cabinet

text: The Schoof Cabinet's ambition to make healthcare more accessible was great. The cabinet's showpiece, halving the deductible by 2027, is now in doubt with the fall of the cabinet. The Court of Audit [recently ruled](https://www.rekenkamer.nl/publicaties/verslag/2025/05/21/vo-2024-vws) that the policy of the Ministry of Health, Welfare and Sport (VWS) is not clear or does not work. It is unclear whether the agreements in the Integrated Care Agreement (IZA) contribute to future-proof care. In any case, digitalization and innovation contribute to future-proof healthcare.

metadata.source_title: The healthcare sector also innovates without a cabinet

text: The cabinet's showpiece, halving the deductible by 2027, is now in doubt with the fall of the cabinet. The Court of Audit [recently ruled](https://www.rekenkamer.nl/publicaties/verslag/2025/05/21/vo-2024-vws) that the policy of the Ministry of Health, Welfare and Sport (VWS) is not clear or does not work. It is unclear whether the agreements in the Integrated Care Agreement (IZA) contribute to future-proof care. In any case, digitalization and innovation contribute to future-proof healthcare. This was stated several times by Minister Fleur Agema of VWS.

metadata.source_title: The healthcare sector also innovates without a cabinet

text: The Court of Audit [recently ruled](https://www.rekenkamer.nl/publicaties/verslag/2025/05/21/vo-2024-vws) that the policy of the Ministry of Health, Welfare and Sport (VWS) is not clear or does not work. It is unclear whether the agreements in the Integrated Care Agreement (IZA) contribute to future-proof care. In any case, digitalization and innovation contribute to future-proof healthcare. This was stated several times by Minister Fleur Agema of VWS. Healthcare providers recognize this as an important way to keep healthcare accessible.

metadata.source_title: The healthcare sector also innovates without a cabinet

text: It is unclear whether the agreements in the Integrated Care Agreement (IZA) contribute to future-proof care. In any case, digitalization and innovation contribute to future-proof healthcare. This was stated several times by Minister Fleur Agema of VWS. Healthcare providers recognize this as an important way to keep healthcare accessible. However, innovation is hampered by the complexity of the healthcare system with varying financing laws and the lack of rates for new digital forms of healthcare provision. > “All kinds of welfare questions are asked by healthcare providers.

metadata.source_title: The healthcare sector also innovates without a cabinet

text:
In any case, digitalization and innovation contribute to future-proof healthcare. This was stated several times by Minister Fleur Agema of VWS. Healthcare providers recognize this as an important way to keep healthcare accessible. However, innovation is hampered by the complexity of the healthcare system with varying financing laws and the lack of rates for new digital forms of healthcare provision. > “All kinds of welfare questions are asked by healthcare providers. The government must therefore invest in welfare and prevention, and encourage companies to make choices that contribute to a healthy society.”
Healthcare providers do not go on hold.

metadata.source_title: The healthcare sector also innovates without a cabinet

text:
This was stated several times by Minister Fleur Agema of VWS. Healthcare providers recognize this as an important way to keep healthcare accessible. However, innovation is hampered by the complexity of the healthcare system with varying financing laws and the lack of rates for new digital forms of healthcare provision. > “All kinds of welfare questions are asked by healthcare providers. The government must therefore invest in welfare and prevention, and encourage companies to make choices that contribute to a healthy society.”
Healthcare providers do not go on hold. While Agema recently managed to free up a few hundred million euros for digitalization in healthcare after a lot of haggling with the Minister of Finance, healthcare providers had already implemented numerous innovations.

metadata.source_title: The healthcare sector also innovates without a cabinet

text:
Healthcare providers recognize this as an important way to keep healthcare accessible. However, innovation is hampered by the complexity of the healthcare system with varying financing laws and the lack of rates for new digital forms of healthcare provision. > “All kinds of welfare questions are asked by healthcare providers. The government must therefore invest in welfare and prevention, and encourage companies to make choices that contribute to a healthy society.”
Healthcare providers do not go on hold. While Agema recently managed to free up a few hundred million euros for digitalization in healthcare after a lot of haggling with the Minister of Finance, healthcare providers had already implemented numerous innovations. For example, hospitals fill empty gaps in schedules with the help of AI, nursing homes operate with fewer caregivers thanks to bed sensors, and home care has to visit a client less often thanks to a tool to put on a support stocking.

metadata.source_title: The healthcare sector also innovates without a cabinet

text:
However, innovation is hampered by the complexity of the healthcare system with varying financing laws and the lack of rates for new digital forms of healthcare provision. > “All kinds of welfare questions are asked by healthcare providers. The government must therefore invest in welfare and prevention, and encourage companies to make choices that contribute to a healthy society.”
Healthcare providers do not go on hold. While Agema recently managed to free up a few hundred million euros for digitalization in healthcare after a lot of haggling with the Minister of Finance, healthcare providers had already implemented numerous innovations. For example, hospitals fill empty gaps in schedules with the help of AI, nursing homes operate with fewer caregivers thanks to bed sensors, and home care has to visit a client less often thanks to a tool to put on a support stocking. The extra money that Agema wanted to make available is always welcome, but unfortunately digitalization does not solve all problems.

metadata.source_title: The healthcare sector also innovates without a cabinet

text:
The government must therefore invest in welfare and prevention, and encourage companies to make choices that contribute to a healthy society.”
Healthcare providers do not go on hold. While Agema recently managed to free up a few hundred million euros for digitalization in healthcare after a lot of haggling with the Minister of Finance, healthcare providers had already implemented numerous innovations. For example, hospitals fill empty gaps in schedules with the help of AI, nursing homes operate with fewer caregivers thanks to bed sensors, and home care has to visit a client less often thanks to a tool to put on a support stocking. The extra money that Agema wanted to make available is always welcome, but unfortunately digitalization does not solve all problems. Healthcare providers are mainly confronted with excessive demand for care, complexity of the healthcare system, and the question of which care requests they are responsible for.

metadata.source_title: The healthcare sector also innovates without a cabinet

text: While Agema recently managed to free up a few hundred million euros for digitalization in healthcare after a lot of haggling with the Minister of Finance, healthcare providers had already implemented numerous innovations. For example, hospitals fill empty gaps in schedules with the help of AI, nursing homes operate with fewer caregivers thanks to bed sensors, and home care has to visit a client less often thanks to a tool to put on a support stocking. The extra money that Agema wanted to make available is always welcome, but unfortunately digitalization does not solve all problems. Healthcare providers are mainly confronted with excessive demand for care, complexity of the healthcare system, and the question of which care requests they are responsible for. In this way, all kinds of welfare questions are asked by healthcare providers.

metadata.source_title: The healthcare sector also innovates without a cabinet

text: For example, hospitals fill empty gaps in schedules with the help of AI, nursing homes operate with fewer caregivers thanks to bed sensors, and home care has to visit a client less often thanks to a tool to put on a support stocking. The extra money that Agema wanted to make available is always welcome, but unfortunately digitalization does not solve all problems. Healthcare providers are mainly confronted with excessive demand for care, complexity of the healthcare system, and the question of which care requests they are responsible for. In this way, all kinds of welfare questions are asked by healthcare providers. The government must therefore invest in well-being and prevention, and encourage companies to make choices that contribute to a healthy society. [Read also: Companies take the lead for a healthy society](/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/healthcare/bedrijven-aan-zet-voor-een-gezonde-samenleving.html).

Pursue a broader policy on welfare and health. The next cabinet can mainly be of added value to the healthcare sector by making clear choices. For example, care needs often arise from social problems that should therefore be addressed at an earlier stage, namely with sufficient housing, good education and a social safety net.

text:
The next cabinet can show courage by taking responsibility for a healthy society.”
Pursue a broader policy on welfare and health. The next cabinet can mainly be of added value to the healthcare sector by making clear choices. A minister with a clear vision about what can be expected from healthcare, and which problems can be solved with other ministries. For example, care needs often arise from social problems that should therefore be addressed at an earlier stage, namely with sufficient housing, good education and a social safety net. In addition, healthcare providers in mental health care, youth care and home care are helped with major adjustments to the complex healthcare system.

metadata.source_title: The healthcare sector also innovates without a cabinet

text: The next cabinet can mainly be of added value to the healthcare sector by making clear choices. A minister with a clear vision about what can be expected from healthcare, and which problems can be solved with other ministries. For example, care needs often arise from social problems that should therefore be addressed at an earlier stage, namely with sufficient housing, good education and a social safety net. In addition, healthcare providers in mental health care, youth care and home care are helped with major adjustments to the complex healthcare system. In particular, the sale of care to different municipalities, a care office and a health insurer is time-intensive and prevents collaboration between care providers and care purchasers to innovate.

metadata.source_title: The healthcare sector also innovates without a cabinet

text: A minister with a clear vision about what can be expected from healthcare, and which problems can be solved with other ministries. For example, care needs often arise from social problems that should therefore be addressed at an earlier stage, namely with sufficient housing, good education and a social safety net. In addition, healthcare providers in mental health care, youth care and home care are helped with major adjustments to the complex healthcare system. In particular, the sale of care to different municipalities, a care office and a health insurer is time-intensive and prevents collaboration between care providers and care purchasers to innovate. Too often, a measure that reduces the need for care is not reimbursed because the savings end up with another party.

metadata.source_title: The healthcare sector also innovates without a cabinet

text: For example, care needs often arise from social problems that should therefore be addressed at an earlier stage, namely with sufficient housing, good education and a social safety net. In addition, healthcare providers in mental health care, youth care and home care are helped with major adjustments to the complex healthcare system. In particular, the sale of care to different municipalities, a care office and a health insurer is time-intensive and prevents collaboration between care providers and care purchasers to innovate. Too often, a measure that reduces the need for care is not reimbursed because the savings end up with another party. For example, adjustments in homes such as a stair lift or a shower chair are reimbursed by municipalities, but the savings from fewer care hours end up at the care office.

metadata.source_title: The healthcare sector also innovates without a cabinet

text: In addition, healthcare providers in mental health care, youth care and home care are helped with major adjustments to the complex healthcare system. In particular, the sale of care to different municipalities, a care office and a health insurer is time-intensive and prevents collaboration between care providers and care purchasers to innovate. Too often, a measure that reduces the need for care is not reimbursed because the savings end up with another party. For example, adjustments in homes such as a stair lift or a shower chair are reimbursed by municipalities, but the savings from fewer care hours end up at the care office. Agema wanted to solve this problem with an extra pot of money.

metadata.source_title: The healthcare sector also innovates without a cabinet

text: In particular, the sale of care to different municipalities, a care office and a health insurer is time-intensive and prevents collaboration between care providers and care purchasers to innovate. Too often, a measure that reduces the need for care is not reimbursed because the savings end up with another party. For example, adjustments in homes such as a stair lift or a shower chair are reimbursed by municipalities, but the savings from fewer care hours end up at the care office. Agema wanted to solve this problem with an extra pot of money. The question is whether this will mend the cracks in the system and help people with social health problems.

metadata.source_title: The healthcare sector also innovates without a cabinet

text: Too often, a measure that reduces the need for care is not reimbursed because the savings end up with another party. For example, adjustments in homes such as a stair lift or a shower chair are reimbursed by municipalities, but the savings from fewer care hours end up at the care office. Agema wanted to solve this problem with an extra pot of money. The question is whether this will mend the cracks in the system and help people with social health problems. The next government can show courage by taking responsibility for a healthy society.

metadata.source_title: The healthcare sector also innovates without a cabinet

text: For example, adjustments in homes such as a stair lift or a shower chair are reimbursed by municipalities, but the savings from fewer care hours end up at the care office. Agema wanted to solve this problem with an extra pot of money. The question is whether this will mend the cracks in the system and help people with social health problems. The next government can show courage by taking responsibility for a healthy society. This requires investments in welfare and prevention, agreements with the business community and central purchasing of mental health care, youth care and social support.

metadata.source_title: The healthcare sector also innovates without a cabinet

text: He conducts research into developments in the healthcare sector and on themes such as circularity and social issues. With his analyses, David explains underlying trends. Read more in the Healthcare sector. In the coming years, the sector will change to provide more care with fewer resources. The demand for care continues to increase due to an aging population, while it is hardly possible to attract more healthcare personnel.

metadata.source_title: The healthcare sector also innovates without a cabinet

text:
With his analyses, David explains underlying trends. Read more in the Healthcare sector. In the coming years, the sector will change to provide more care with fewer resources. The demand for care continues to increase due to an aging population, while it is hardly possible to attract more healthcare personnel. Innovation and collaboration make work easier and more fun, ensuring that healthcare provision remains sustainable and of high quality.
